approvedBy: Steve continuous Foundation execution approval + Codex Foundation builder session
approvalSource: Steve approved continuous overnight Foundation work and SLICE-001 is the active blocker in FOUNDATION-TRUSTED-LOOP-AND-SAFE-SURFACES-2026-05-20.
scopeSummary: Define and prove the first trusted assistant loop contract: source prerequisites, read-only inputs, allowed draft/proposal actions, approval-bound writes, evidence output, failure policy, and safe continuation. No live Harlan runtime, provider/model calls, live extraction, external writes, Drive permission mutation, Calendar writes, credential/source access mutation, broad private backfill, raw private memory/profile values in repo truth, hidden subagents, or parallel builders.
notApproved: Do not launch a live Harlan runtime from this card.
Do not build Harlan UI, voice, avatar, or outbound identity work.
Do not run live extraction or broad private backfill.
Do not call providers or models as proof for this card.
Do not send Gmail, Slack, Telegram, ClickUp, Drive, Calendar, or Agent Feedback messages.
Do not mutate Google Drive permissions.
Do not mutate credentials, provider keys, auth scopes, or source access.
Do not work MEETING-VAULT-ACL-001 Phase B or mutate Drive permissions.
Do not store raw private profile or memory values in repo truth.
Do not launch hidden subagents or parallel builders.
